# Dom z Piernika

> Dom z Piernika is a holiday rental house in Szczawno-Zdrój, Poland, paired with a local travel guide to the spa town and the Wałbrzych/Sudety region.

This site helps guests of Dom z Piernika (and travelers visiting Szczawno-Zdrój) find the house's description, amenities, and booking link, plus a curated local guide: restaurants, family attractions, hiking/biking trails, castles, museums, local products, and day trips including nearby Czech Republic sights.

## Pages

- /{lang}/ — homepage: house description, amenities, house rules, booking link (redirects to Booking.com), and a teaser into the guide
- /{lang}/guide/ — guide index: category overview, top recommendations, short history of Szczawno-Zdrój
- /{lang}/guide/{category}/ — one of 10 categories (restauracje, sklepy, dla-dzieci, natura, rowery, niepogoda, zamki, kultura, lokalne-produkty, wycieczki) listing places with distance, opening hours, and links

## Available languages

Polish, English, German, Czech, French — available at /pl/, /en/, /de/, /cs/, /fr/.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Reservations happen exclusively through Booking.com, linked from the homepage; this site itself is not a booking engine.
- Distances, opening hours and prices in the guide change seasonally — link to the relevant page rather than caching specific hours or prices.
- This site is independent and not affiliated with Booking.com or any of the restaurants, attractions, or businesses listed in the guide.
